text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh. A stamina-restoring item<n>dropped. Might as
well use it since I<n>got time to spare.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for crying out loud. Would it kill<n>you to use your
inside voice once in a<n>while?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Sorry, my bad! But, but,<n>but—you know
what? Something<n>really cool just happened!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ack! The hell are you crying for?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't believe you put your phoneaway in the middle of a game to listento me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm sooo touched! I can't believe<n>you've gotten
this used to chatting<n>with people! I'm so proud of
youuu!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, that's not... Ugh, forget it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Lately, it's been easier talking with<n>Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by this, I decide to<n>discuss her
training regimen together<n>with her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll just listen today, so say whatever<n>you want.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why are you freaking out? All I said<n>is that I'd
listen!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems awfully<n>embarrassed for
some reason.
